summary: The page reproduces all 11 sections in correct order with character-accurate text and all required EDS signature classes present. Visual fidelity is strong (92% pixel match), with the main deviations being secondary nav background color, hero text wrapping, a duplicate 'Not actual size' label, and several minor icon x-position offsets.

issues.expected: Secondary nav background should be the muted blue-grey #50758A as in design, and audience text/links aligned at ~155px content edge
issues.actual: Render shows a near-black/dark grey secondary nav bar; logo and links shifted to x=16px instead of x≈155px
issues.fix: Set .epc-secondary-nav background to #50758A and apply correct content padding (~155px) so logo/links align with content edge

issues.expected: Single 'Not actual size.' caption above the heading
issues.actual: 'Not actual size.' appears twice (once as epc-card-actual and seemingly repeated)
issues.fix: Remove the duplicate 'Not actual size.' caption so it shows only once

issues.expected: Heading 'Put curing hepatitis C on your' fits on roughly two lines with TO-DAY LIST image beneath; tighter vertical layout
issues.actual: Heading wraps to three lines making hero content overflow/clip the CTA at strip boundary
issues.fix: Increase hero title max-width or reduce font-size/line-height to match the two-line design layout

issues.expected: Gilead logo positioned at x≈275px @1366 artboard
issues.fix: Adjust footer logo column padding/alignment to x≈275px
Adjust top-link spacing/positioning to align icons to design x positions
Shift .epc-video-controls right offset to align with design positions

issues.expected: magnify icon at x≈314px and arrow button at x≈877px
issues.fix: Adjust card2 internal spacing/padding to match design x positions

issues.expected: Design uses Inter/proxima-nova per tokens; many components specify Montserrat
issues.actual: CSS uses 'Montserrat' for cards, ISI, footer which is not a design token font
issues.fix: Replace Montserrat with var(--font-family-secondary)/Inter where appropriate per design tokens
